properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Some folks just don't understand about the things I say When food is low and shoes have holes and bills are hard to pay Even though they look and see I might not have a dime But keep me hear on testifying Claiming all the time

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: That I'm a rich man Oh, I'm a rich man I've got the things that money cannot buy Oh, I'm a rich man Yes I'm a rich man With the greatest gift of all Eternal life.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I've got the things that wealthy men Would give their money for Health and strength and family with children I adore The breath I breathe, the blood that flows Are precious in His sight But most of all the greatest gift That's God's eternal life.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Riches are not measured by the money in your hand The cars you drive, the clothes you wear Your houses or your land The greatest thing that you can have Don't change from day to day They can't be bought, they can't be sold and never pass away.
